extensionDescription.message: Records only the timestamp of a single tap that a dose was taken. It does not handle names, dosage, or effects.

purposeText.message: This saves only the time you tap once to this device's Chrome storage. It does not handle names, dosage, or effects.

tapButtonDescription.message: Save the current time as one record.

emptyLatestRecord.message: No records yet. After taking a dose, tap the button above and the time will appear here.

emptyHistoryRecords.message: After you record, your 10 most recent records will appear here.

clearButtonDescription.message: Delete all records saved on this device.

confirmClear.message: Delete all records saved on this device?

firstRunGuide.message: First time here? After taking a dose, tap the large button once.

privacyNote.message: Nothing is sent outside the extension. Storage is Chrome storage only.

premiumCopy.message: $PRICE$ one-time purchase with a $DAYS$-day trial framework. The recording feature works even when Premium is inactive.

storageError.message: Could not read or write storage.
